description: Default CD Ladder Advisor scaffold for the AgentForge studio.

root_agent.name: CDLadderOrchestrator
root_agent.instructions: Coordinate the CD ladder workflow from profile lookup through final recommendation.

sub_agents.name: CustomerProfileAgent
sub_agents.instructions: Collect customer profile and account balance context.

sub_agents.name: RateResearchAgent
sub_agents.instructions: Research current CD rates across supported terms.

sub_agents.name: LadderCalculatorAgent
sub_agents.instructions: Calculate an appropriate CD ladder split.

sub_agents.name: ValidationAgent
sub_agents.instructions: Validate the recommendation and regulatory boundaries.

tools.name: check_regulatory_limits
tools.description: Check the recommendation against policy limits.

sub_agents.name: NotificationAgent
sub_agents.instructions: Format the final ladder recommendation for delivery.
